languages.text:
При применении уменьшает моментум всего отряда на 100 ед
Всем врагам снижает резолв персонажа до 1 ед и запрещает применять абилки Офицера

traits.locale_text:
При применении уменьшает моментум всего отряда на 100 ед
Всем врагам снижает резолв персонажа до 1 ед и запрещает применять абилки Офицера

languages.text: Способность снижает {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}моментум{/g} на 100. У всех врагов существа {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}решимость{/g} снижается до 1, а также становятся недоступными способности {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}офицера{/g}.
languages.original_text: Whenever this ability is used, the whole party suffers −100 {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g}. All enemies of the creature have their {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} reduced to 1 and cannot use {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities.

traits.locale_text: Способность снижает {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}моментум{/g} на 100. У всех врагов существа {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}решимость{/g} снижается до 1, а также становятся недоступными способности {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}офицера{/g}.

Способность снижает {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}моментум{/g} на 100. У всех врагов существа {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}решимость{/g} снижается до 1, а также становятся недоступными способности {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}офицера{/g}.

languages.text: Whenever this ability is used, the whole party suffers −100 {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g}. All enemies of the creature have their {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} reduced to 1 and cannot use {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities.
languages.original_text:
При применении уменьшает моментум всего отряда на 100 ед
Всем врагам снижает резолв персонажа до 1 ед и запрещает применять абилки Офицера

traits.locale_text: Whenever this ability is used, the whole party suffers −100 momentum. All enemies of the creature have their resolve reduced to 1 and cannot use the Officer's abilities.

Whenever this ability is used, the whole party suffers −100 {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g}. All enemies of the creature have their {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} reduced to 1 and cannot use {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities.

Whenever this ability is used, the whole party suffers −100 {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g}. All enemies of the creature have their {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} reduced to 1 and cannot use{g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities.

Whenever this ability is used, the whole party suffers −100 {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g}. All enemies of the creature have their {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} reduced to 1 and cannot use the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g}'s abilities.

languages.text: À chaque utilisation de cette capacité, l'ensemble du groupe subit une pénalité de −100 à la {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}Fougue{/g}. Tous les ennemis de la créature voient leur {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Détermination{/g} réduite à 1 et ils ne peuvent plus utiliser de capacités d'{g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}officier{/g}.
languages.original_text: Whenever this ability is used, the whole party suffers −100 {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g}. All enemies of the creature have their {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} reduced to 1 and cannot use {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities.

traits.locale_text: À chaque utilisation de cette capacité, l'ensemble du groupe subit une pénalité de −100 à la {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}Fougue{/g}. Tous les ennemis de la créature voient leur {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Détermination{/g} réduite à 1 et ils ne peuvent plus utiliser de capacités d'{g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}officier{/g}.

languages.text: Bu kabiliyet kullanıldığında tüm grup, −100 {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentuma{/g} maruz kalır. Yaratığın tüm düşmanlarının {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}kararlılık{/g} değeri 1'i iner ve hiçbiri, {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Subay{/g} kabiliyetlerini kullanamaz.
languages.original_text: Whenever this ability is used, the whole party suffers −100 {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g}. All enemies of the creature have their {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} reduced to 1 and cannot use {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities.

traits.locale_text: Bu kabiliyet kullanıldığında tüm grup, −100 {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentuma{/g} maruz kalır. Yaratığın tüm düşmanlarının {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}kararlılık{/g} değeri 1'i iner ve hiçbiri, {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Subay{/g} kabiliyetlerini kullanamaz.

languages.text: 发动此能力会使全队{g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}士气{/g}降低100。该生物的所有敌人{g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}决心{/g}降至1，且无法使用{g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}军官{/g}能力。
languages.original_text: Whenever this ability is used, the whole party suffers −100 {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g}. All enemies of the creature have their {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} reduced to 1 and cannot use {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities.

traits.locale_text: 发动此能力会使全队{g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}士气{/g}降低100。该生物的所有敌人{g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}决心{/g}降至1，且无法使用{g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}军官{/g}能力。

languages.text: Cada vez que se utiliza esta capacidad, el grupo entero pierde 100 de {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}ímpetu{/g}. La {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}firmeza{/g} de todos los enemigos de la criatura se reduce a 1 y ya no podrán usar las capacidades del {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}oficial{/g}.
languages.original_text: Whenever this ability is used, the whole party suffers −100 {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g}. All enemies of the creature have their {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} reduced to 1 and cannot use {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities.

traits.locale_text: Cada vez que se utiliza esta capacidad, el grupo entero pierde 100 de {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}ímpetu{/g}. La {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}firmeza{/g} de todos los enemigos de la criatura se reduce a 1 y ya no podrán usar las capacidades del {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}oficial{/g}.

languages.text: Wird diese Fähigkeit eingesetzt, hat die gesamte Gruppe −100 {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}Dynamik{/g}. Die {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Entschlossenheit{/g} aller Gegner der Kreatur sinkt auf 1 und sie können keine {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Offizier{/g}-Fähigkeiten einsetzen.
languages.original_text: Whenever this ability is used, the whole party suffers −100 {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g}. All enemies of the creature have their {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} reduced to 1 and cannot use {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities.

traits.locale_text: Wird diese Fähigkeit eingesetzt, hat die gesamte Gruppe −100 {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}Dynamik{/g}. Die {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Entschlossenheit{/g} aller Gegner der Kreatur sinkt auf 1 und sie können keine {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Offizier{/g}-Fähigkeiten einsetzen.

languages.text: この能力を使うたびに、全パーティの{g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}勢い{/g}が-100される。この能力を使うと、敵の{g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}決意{/g}が1になり、{g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}指揮官{/g}の能力が使えなくなる。
languages.original_text: Whenever this ability is used, the whole party suffers −100 {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g}. All enemies of the creature have their {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} reduced to 1 and cannot use {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities.

traits.locale_text: この能力を使うたびに、全パーティの{g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}勢い{/g}が-100される。この能力を使うと、敵の{g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}決意{/g}が1になり、{g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}指揮官{/g}の能力が使えなくなる。
